items.title: Classes & OOP
items.description: dataclasses are regular classes with auto-generated methods; understanding __init__/__repr__/__eq__ clarifies what the decorator does.

items.title: Variables & Data Types
items.description: These containers and records refine the built-in types (dict, tuple, list) for specific jobs.

items.title: Functions & Scope
items.description: field(default_factory=...) exists precisely to avoid the mutable default argument trap.
